warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: with a buddy
200m jog together
10 worlds greatest stretch
5 Cossack squats per side
10 Ring Rows
10 air squats
6 DB snatch
6 V-ups or Tuck Sits

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
Partner Workout - Partition as required
30 min AMRAP
Buy in
1000/800m row
20 Ring Rows
30 Wall Balls
40 Dumbell Snatches
30 V-ups
20 Burpees
10 Assault Bike Cals (each)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today's metcon emphasizes chest, shoulders, and anterior core; accessory work targets posterior chain and arms to prevent imbalances.

siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: AMRAP 30 minutes: Partner Workout - Partition as required, Buy in, 1000/800m row, 20 Ring Rows, 30 Wall Balls. For hypertrophy, focus on hamstrings, glutes, rear delts.
